---
id: get-resource-versions-id-download
title: "Downloads a file from the specified resource version"
description: "Downloads a file from the specified resource version. For external downloads, redirects to the external URL."
sidebar_label: "Downloads a file from the specified resource version"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Downloads a file from the specified resource version"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/resource-versions/{id}/download"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Downloads a file from the specified resource version. For external downloads, redirects to the external URL.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"id","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"description":""},{"name":"file","in":"query","schema":{"type":"integer"},"description":"Attachment ID of the file to download. Required for local downloads."}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful response"}}}
>
